The unit is sun-Facing, creating a bright and positive living environment, while the backside offers a serene park view, adding to the peaceful ambiance of the home.

The modular kitchen is well equipped with modern cabinets and storage solutions, offering both style and convenience for daily cooking needs. All bedrooms come with built-In wardrobes, providing ample storage space while maintaining a neat and elegant look. A beautifully designed crockery unit adds sophistication to the dining area and provides additional storage for your kitchen essentials.

The apartment also includes lights, ceiling fans, and geysers, ensuring that the home is ready for immediate occupancy without requiring any additional setup. The thoughtful furnishing ensures comfort, convenience, and efficient use of space.

One of the major highlights of this property is the exclusive terrace rights attached to the top floor, offering a private open space that can be used for family gatherings, outdoor seating, gardening, or simply enjoying evening relaxation with panoramic views.

Additionally, the apartment comes with extra office or storage space in the basement, which is a rare and highly valuable feature. This space can be used as a home office, work studio, additional storage, or utility area, providing great flexibility depending on your needs.

The property also includes dedicated covered car parking, ensuring the safety and convenience of your vehicle. In addition, a wardrobe/storage unit in the basement area is provided, which can be used for keeping seasonal items, luggage, or extra household belongings.

Being located in smartworld gems, residents enjoy a well-Planned township environment with wide roads, landscaped greens, and modern lifestyle amenities. The project offers a peaceful community living experience while still being well connected to major parts of gurgaon and delhi ncr.

The location provides excellent connectivity to dwarka expressway, nh-48, pataudi road, and major business hubs of gurgaon. It is also close to reputed schools, hospitals, shopping complexes, and daily convenience stores, making everyday life extremely comfortable.

This property is ideal for families looking for a premium low-Rise home with terrace rights, investors seeking high rental potential, or professionals who prefer a peaceful residential environment with modern facilities.
